steps.title: Identify the solution to a system of equations
steps.content: The solution to a system of two linear equations is the point where the two lines intersect on the graph. We need to find the coordinates of that intersection point.

steps.title: Read the intersection point from the graph
steps.content: Tracing to where the two lines cross, the intersection occurs at $x = 3$ (three units right) and $y = 9$ (nine units up). The intersection point is $(3, 9)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
